resolution: Skill created with planet data and Kepler solver
Skill created with full MCP tool reference and 3 example scripts
End-to-end test passed: sim renders, WS bridge connects, Zustand store updates React

issue: Orbital MCP tools not available until .mcp.json configured and Claude Code restarted
resolution: .mcp.json created at repo root, tools appear after /restart

issue: Manual THREE.TextureLoader + useState does NOT trigger r3f material updates — textures loaded but materials remained gray
resolution: Switched to useTexture() from @react-three/drei with Suspense boundaries — textures immediately visible

issue: Solar System Scope textures replaced with Planet Pixel Emporium (PPE) + NASA Blue Marble Earth
resolution: PPE downloaded via curl -L (CORS blocks browser), NASA Blue Marble 5400x2700 for Earth. All textures in apps/sim/public/textures/

issue: Saturn rings upgraded from single alpha-PNG to separate PPE color+alpha maps
resolution: useTexture([colorPath, alphaPath]) then meshBasicMaterial with map+alphaMap — rings look accurate with banding

issue: PPE download URLs for moon textures (iomap1k.jpg etc) return HTML 'invalidfile' pages — moons are NOT on PPE
resolution: Use USGS Astropedia CKAN download URLs. Fetch page HTML with curl, grep for .jpg hrefs, get 1024px JPEG. Pattern: astrogeology.usgs.gov/search/map/<page> → ckan dataset download URL

issue: useTexture() throws uncaught error when given an invalid JPEG (HTML error page 476B). Error escapes Suspense, crashes Canvas entirely → white screen
resolution: Validate downloaded files before use. Check file size > 10KB. Replace invalid files with valid placeholder before deploying to avoid white-screen crash

USGS Astropedia provides authentic NASA/JPL moon textures free: Io (Galileo SSI+Voyager), Europa (Voyager+Galileo 1024px), Ganymede (color mosaic 1024px), Callisto, Titan (Cassini ISS). All public domain.

issue: @tanstack/react-hotkeys useHotkeys() requires RawHotkey objects for dynamically generated key strings
resolution: Import RawHotkey type from @tanstack/react-hotkeys (re-exported). Use { key: '1' } as RawHotkey instead of string '1' for type safety with dynamic hotkey arrays

issue: CameraController useEffect firing on every re-render (not just MCP set_camera changes), fighting manual navigation and causing camera snapping
resolution: Track prevStoreCameraRef = useRef(storeCamera). In useEffect, compare storeCamera === prevStoreCameraRef.current and return early if unchanged. Only apply when MCP sends new command.

issue: Outer planets (Uranus/Neptune) invisible at default lighting: ambientLight=0.02, pointLight intensity=60 decay=1
resolution: Increase ambientLight to 0.06 and pointLight intensity to 150 (decay=1 kept). At 19AU: 150/1920=0.078+0.06=0.138 total — visible but dim (physically accurate). At Neptune: 0.11 total.
